# 2026-03-29

## Morning Idea (auto-generated) — ❌ INVALIDATED
- **Topic:** Platform switch label confusion banner
- **Angle:** Accessibility/edge case
- **Idea was:** banner for platform migration terminology changes
- **Why wrong:** Users CAN'T switch accounting platforms within an org — they must create a new org. Each user sticks to one platform. No migration scenario exists.
- **Lesson:** Don't assume platform switching is possible. Org = one accounting platform, forever.

## Onboarding Deep Dive Session (19:30-20:30 UTC)

### What was done
1. **Browser automation walkthrough** of all 4 roles (Accounting Firm, Business Owner, Staff Accountant, Other)
   - 40+ screenshots captured in `.synder-state/flow-acct/`, `flow-bizowner/`, `flow-staff/`, `flow-other/`
   - Documented all form fields, dropdown options, conditional elements
2. **Built comprehensive report** at `reports/onboarding-deep-dive/index.html`
   - 6 tabs: Overview, Role Flows, Drop-off Analytics, Findings & Recs, Bot Audit, Progress Stepper
   - Interactive stepper prototype with Back/Next demo
   - Welcome screen concept
3. **LogRocket Galileo API** — still returning 500 errors on follow-up queries; used March 20 data

### Key discoveries
- **3 distinct flow paths** (not 6): Business, Firm, and Other=Firm+freetext
- **67% of role options** (4 of 6) lead to identical Business flow
- **Hidden Revenue field** — appears conditionally after Industry + Duration filled (Business Owner only)
- **Industry multi-select** (react-select with `#clickableInput`) — Escape key UNDOES selection! Major bot blocker
- **Radio buttons below viewport** (y:944 on 900px viewport) — need scroll + force click
- **Staff Accountant gets Business flow** — questionable (they're at a firm managing clients)
- **"Other" gets Firm flow** — also questionable (they might be business owners)
- **Bot-friendliness: 3/10** — 12 blocking elements documented

### Ignat's additional request
- Create bot-friendliness audit (done, included in report)
- Goal: bots should be able to go through onboarding automatically in the future

### Open items
- Integration step screenshots incomplete (industry field blocks progression intermittently)
- Progress stepper needs standalone prototype HTML
- LogRocket fresh data needed (API issues)

## End-of-Day Summary (23:15 UTC)
**Activity level:** High — major onboarding deep-dive session with Ignat.

**Key outcomes:**
- Morning idea (platform switch banner) was invalidated — orgs are locked to one accounting platform, no migration exists. Good lesson logged.
- Comprehensive onboarding flow analysis: 40+ screenshots, 3 distinct paths mapped, 12 bot-blocking elements documented
- Built interactive report at `reports/onboarding-deep-dive/index.html` with 6 tabs
- Key finding: 67% of role options funnel to identical Business flow — simplification opportunity
- Bot-friendliness audit completed (score: 3/10)
